mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_PRODUCTS.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO PRODUCTS ( prod_no, prod_nm, prod_type, min_prd_mon, max_prd_mon, min_amt, max_amt, tgt_lrg, tgt_dtl, prod_desc, int_pay_type, apld_exch_type, reg_dt, reg_by, rate_cat, apv_stat_cd ) VALUES ( #{product_id}, #{product_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{product_type, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{min_period_month, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{max_period_month, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{min_amount, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{max_amount, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{target_large, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{target_detail, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{product_desc, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{interest_payment_type, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{applied_exchange_rate_type, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, #{created_by, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rate_category, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{approve_status, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )

INSERT INTO PRODUCT_PDFS (pdf_no, prod_no, basic_terms_path, cat_terms_path, spec_terms_path, prod_guide_path, reg_dt) VALUES (SEQ_PRODUCT_PDFS.NEXTVAL, #{product_id, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{basic_terms_path, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{category_terms_path, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{special_terms_path, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{product_guide_path, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE)

INSERT INTO PRODUCT_REQUESTS (req_no, prod_no, req_usr_no, req_stat_cd, req_type, req_dt) VALUES (SEQ_PRODUCT_REQUESTS.NEXTVAL, #{product_id, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, (SELECT A.adm_no FROM ADMIN_USERS A JOIN PRODUCTS P ON A.name = P.reg_by WHERE P.prod_no = #{product_id, jdbcType=NUMERIC}), '검토중', 'CREATE', SYSDATE)
mapper.select: SELECT prod_no AS product_id, prod_nm AS product_name, active, prod_type AS product_type, min_amt AS min_amount, max_amt AS max_amount, min_prd_mon AS min_period_month, max_prd_mon AS max_period_month, apv_stat_cd AS approve_status, reg_dt AS create_date, reg_by AS created_by, tgt_lrg AS target_large, tgt_dtl AS target_detail, rate_cat AS rate_category FROM PRODUCTS ORDER BY prod_no DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pageSize} ROWS ONLY

SELECT P.prod_no AS product_id, P.active, P.prod_nm AS product_name, P.prod_type AS product_type, P.min_prd_mon AS min_period_month, P.max_prd_mon AS max_period_month, P.min_amt AS min_amount, P.max_amt AS max_amount, P.tgt_lrg AS target_large, P.tgt_dtl AS target_detail, P.apv_stat_cd AS approve_status, P.prod_desc AS product_desc, P.int_pay_type AS interest_payment_type, P.apld_exch_type AS applied_exchange_rate_type, P.rate_cat AS rate_category, P.reg_by AS created_by, P.update_dt AS update_date, PDF.basic_terms_path AS basic_terms_path, PDF.cat_terms_path AS category_terms_path, PDF.spec_terms_path AS special_terms_path, PDF.prod_guide_path AS product_guide_path, R.rate_no AS rate_id, R.cur_cd AS currency_code, R.cust_type AS customer_type, R.res_type AS resident_type, R.prd_mon AS period_month, R.base_rate AS base_rate, R.mtr_rate AS maturity_rate, R.early_cxl_rate AS early_cancel_rate, R.rate_start_dt AS rate_start_date, R.rate_end_dt AS rate_end_date, R.rate_type AS rate_type, PR.pref_rate_no AS pref_rate_id, PR.cond_type AS condition_type, PR.cond_desc AS condition_desc, PR.pref_rate AS preferential_rate FROM PRODUCTS P LEFT JOIN ( SELECT prod_no, basic_terms_path, cat_terms_path, spec_terms_path, prod_guide_path FROM ( SELECT prod_no, basic_terms_path, cat_terms_path, spec_terms_path, prod_guide_path, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY prod_no ORDER BY pdf_no DESC) AS rn FROM PRODUCT_PDFS ) WHERE rn = 1 ) PDF ON P.prod_no = PDF.prod_no LEFT JOIN INTEREST_RATES R ON P.prod_no = R.prod_no LEFT JOIN PREFERENTIAL_RATE_CONDITIONS PR ON R.rate_no = PR.rate_no WHERE P.prod_no = #{product_id, jdbcType=NUMERIC}

SELECT prod_no AS product_id, prod_nm AS product_name, prod_type AS product_type, apv_stat_cd AS approve_status, reg_dt AS create_date, reg_by AS created_by, active FROM PRODUCTS WHERE apv_stat_cd = #{approve_status, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY prod_no DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE PRODUCT_REQUESTS SET req_stat_cd = 'UPDATE' WHERE prod_no = #{product_id, jdbcType=NUMERIC}

MERGE INTO PRODUCT_PDFS T USING (SELECT #{product_id, jdbcType=NUMERIC} AS prod_no FROM DUAL) S ON (T.prod_no = S.prod_no) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET basic_terms_path = COALESCE(#{basic_terms_path, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, T.basic_terms_path), cat_terms_path = COALESCE(#{category_terms_path, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, T.cat_terms_path), spec_terms_path = COALESCE(#{special_terms_path, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, T.spec_terms_path), prod_guide_path = COALESCE(#{product_guide_path, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, T.prod_guide_path), upd_dt = SYSDATE WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (pdf_no, prod_no, basic_terms_path, cat_terms_path, spec_terms_path, prod_guide_path, reg_dt) VALUES (SEQ_PRODUCT_PDFS.NEXTVAL, #{product_id, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{basic_terms_path, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{category_terms_path, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{special_terms_path, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{product_guide_path, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE)
mapper.select: SELECT pdf_no AS "pdf_no", prod_no AS "prod_no", basic_terms_path AS "basic_terms_path", cat_terms_path AS "cat_terms_path", spec_terms_path AS "spec_terms_path", prod_guide_path AS "prod_guide_path", TO_CHAR(reg_dt, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS "reg_dt" FROM PRODUCT_PDFS WHERE prod_no = #{product_id, jdbcType=NUMERIC} ORDER BY pdf_no DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM PRODUCT_PDFS WHERE prod_no = #{product_id, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
DELETE FROM PRODUCT_REQUESTS WHERE prod_no = #{product_id, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
DELETE FROM PRODUCTS WHERE prod_no = #{product_id, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PRODUCTS WHERE prod_type = #{product_type, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PRODUCTS WHERE apv_stat_cd = #{approve_status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_INTEREST_RATES.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO INTEREST_RATES ( rate_no, prod_no, cur_cd, cust_type, res_type, prd_mon, base_rate, mtr_rate, early_cxl_rate, rate_start_dt, rate_end_dt, rate_type, pref_rate, reg_dt ) VALUES ( #{rate_id}, #{product_id, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{currency_code, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customer_type, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{resident_type, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{period_month, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{base_rate, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{maturity_rate, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{early_cancel_rate, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{rate_start_date, jdbcType=DATE}, #{rate_end_date, jdbcType=DATE}, #{rate_type, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{preferential_rate, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT rate_no AS rate_id, prod_no AS product_id, cur_cd AS currency_code, base_rate, prd_mon AS period_month FROM INTEREST_RATES WHERE prod_no = #{product_id, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
SELECT rate_no AS rate_id, base_rate FROM INTEREST_RATES WHERE rate_no = #{rate_id, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
mapper.update: UPDATE INTEREST_RATES SET base_rate = #{base_rate, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, upd_dt = SYSDATE WHERE rate_no = #{rate_id, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM INTEREST_RATES WHERE rate_no = #{rate_id, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
DELETE FROM INTEREST_RATES WHERE prod_no = #{product_id, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PREFERENTIAL_RATE_CONDITIONS (pref_rate_no, rate_no, cond_type, cond_desc, pref_rate) VALUES (SEQ_PREFERENTIAL_RATE_CONDITIONS.NEXTVAL, #{rate_id, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{condition_type, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{condition_desc, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{preferential_rate, jdbcType=NUMERIC})
mapper.select: SELECT pref_rate_no AS pref_rate_id, cond_type AS condition_type, pref_rate AS preferential_rate FROM PREFERENTIAL_RATE_CONDITIONS WHERE rate_no = #{rate_id, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
mapper.update: UPDATE PREFERENTIAL_RATE_CONDITIONS SET cond_type = #{condition_type, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, pref_rate = #{preferential_rate, jdbcType=NUMERIC} WHERE pref_rate_no = #{pref_rate_id, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM PREFERENTIAL_RATE_CONDITIONS WHERE pref_rate_no = #{pref_rate_id, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
DELETE FROM PREFERENTIAL_RATE_CONDITIONS WHERE rate_no IN (SELECT rate_no FROM INTEREST_RATES WHERE prod_no = #{product_id, jdbcType=NUMERIC})
DELETE FROM PREFERENTIAL_RATE_CONDITIONS WHERE rate_no = #{rate_id, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PRODUCT_CURRENCIES (prod_cur_no, prod_no, cur_cd, cur_nm, is_avail, reg_dt) VALUES (SEQ_PRODUCT_CURRENCIES.NEXTVAL, #{product_id, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{cur_cd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cur_nm, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'Y', SYSDATE)
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM PRODUCT_CURRENCIES WHERE prod_no = #{product_id, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
mapper.select: SELECT prod_cur_no, prod_no AS product_id, cur_cd, cur_nm, is_avail AS avail FROM PRODUCT_CURRENCIES WHERE prod_no = #{product_id, jdbcType=NUMERIC} ORDER BY cur_cd
mapper.update: UPDATE PRODUCT_CURRENCIES SET is_avail = 'N' WHERE prod_cur_no = #{prod_cur_no, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
mapper.select: SELECT P.prod_no AS product_id, P.prod_nm AS product_name, P.active, P.prod_type AS product_type, P.min_amt AS min_amount, P.max_amt AS max_amount, P.min_prd_mon AS min_period_month, P.max_prd_mon AS max_period_month, P.apv_stat_cd AS approve_status, P.reg_dt AS create_date, P.reg_by AS created_by, P.tgt_lrg AS target_large, P.tgt_dtl AS target_detail, P.rate_cat AS rate_category, P.prod_desc AS product_desc, P.int_pay_type AS interest_payment_type, P.apld_exch_type AS applied_exchange_rate_type, C.prod_cur_no, C.cur_cd, C.cur_nm, C.is_avail AS avail FROM PRODUCTS P LEFT JOIN PRODUCT_CURRENCIES C ON P.prod_no = C.prod_no AND C.is_avail = 'Y' ORDER BY P.prod_no DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pageSize} ROWS ONLY
